evidence.section_path: Sign in with Podio > Sign in with

evidence.page_title: Work Management Platform | Streamline Collaboration & Workflows | Podio
evidence.content:
Unify and automate work with no-code tools, flexible workflows and
customizable business solutions.

[Sign Up](https://podio.com/signup?force_locale=en_US)

[Log In](https://podio.com/login?force_locale=en_US)

![](https://www.progress.com/images/default-source/products/podio/podio-head-illustration.png?sfvrsn=aa4cf807_1)

Podio supports building digital workspaces tailored to your team's unique
processes. Whether you're tracking leads, managing projects, streamlining operations or
automating approvals, Podio is built to support a wide range of workflows. With powerful
no-code tools, automation and real-time collaboration, Podio helps you structure, scale and
simplify work—on your terms.

- No-code drag and drop builder to customize your data structure
- Personalized dashboards and workspace layouts
- Multiple data views: table, kanban, calendar and badge
- Pre-built templates to jumpstart setup
- Bidirectional relationship fields to link related data items
- Webforms for data intake to capture external submissions

![](https://www.progress.com/images/default-source/products/podio/customizeeb80215c-77f8-4dbb-8d3d-04a1f08cc322.svg?sfvrsn=2e907118_1)

* * *

- Customize powerful workflows with If-This-Then-That rules
- Automate task assignments, status updates and notifications
- Use calculations and custom rules to power dynamic workflows
- Integrate with 3rd party tools and other systems of records
- Trigger actions across systems with API-first flexibility
- Generate pdf documents from templates
- Initiate signature and approval requests
- Automate email and SMS delivery using dynamic content

![](https://www.progress.com/images/default-source/products/podio/automate5fa4e0cd-6502-46a8-b6cd-d41446ffbfd4.svg?sfvrsn=d6dd6394_1)

* * *

Tech Cares Awards](https://www.trustradius.com/products/podio/reviews)

Podio supports businesses of all sizes streamline operations, improve
visibility and make more informed decisions. Whether you're a startup or a global
enterprise, Podio is built to support a range of needs with advanced automation and
customizable workflows—leaving teams to focus on high-impact work.

- ##### Boost Productivity


Automate repetitive tasks and streamline handoffs with structured
workflows that save time and minimize errors.

- ##### Improve Collaboration


Break down silos with shared workspaces, client access, real-time
updates and mobile-ready tools.

- ##### Enhance Visibility


Centralize data, conversations and project updates in one place for
real-time insights and accountability.

- ##### Scale with Flexibility


Tailor Podio to your evolving business needs with flexible
architecture, robust APIs and security features designed to support enterprise needs.


- ##### Accelerate Time to Value


Quickly launch custom apps and workspaces using no-code
tools.

- ##### One Platform. Endless Possibilities.


Support multiple work types—CRM, project tracking, approvals,
and more—on a single platform to help reduce tool sprawl and license costs.
evidence.section_path: Simplify Work, Amplify Results with Progress Podio > Boost Efficiency, Empower Teams   and Scale with Confidence

evidence.page_title: Work Management Platform | Streamline Collaboration & Workflows | Podio
evidence.content:
Real Teams. Real Results.

> ### Grew 30x with Podio generating 5x ROI in six months
>
> We wanted to have something custom,
> and Anders (from Workways) told me about his Podio experience and how you
> can build whatever you want and his recommendation on where to start.
> Without Podio and its automations, my company would be a lot less
> profitable.
>
> Stefan
> Stojkovic,
> Founder, GulvKanonen
> In collaboration with trusted
> Podio Partner, Workways [Read full story](https://www.sharefile.com/resource/customer-story/gulvkanonen)
>
> ![forside-bannertop](https://www.progress.com/images/default-source/products/podio/forside-bannertop.jpg?sfvrsn=951019_1)

> ### Automate to operate without boundaries
>
> What can easily take 4-to-6-person
> team in comparable companies, is handled by 0.25 of an employee in our
> organization with Podio.
>
> Kasper
> Dam
> Founder and CEO, Kandio
> [Read full story](https://www.sharefile.com/resource/customer-story/kandio)
>
> ![Automate to operate without boundaries](https://www.progress.com/images/default-source/products/podio/website_customer_stories_gettyimages-1356386299.webp?sfvrsn=462c98eb_1)

> ### Managing growth with technology
>
> I now have a product that is as
> simple or as complex as I want it to be. My favorite thing about Podio, is
> how it does only what I need it to do and nothing more and nothing
> less.
>
> Matthew
> Markoff
> Founder and Tax Partner, Markoff
> & Malatesta CPAs PLLC
> [Read full\\
> story](https://www.sharefile.com/resource/customer-story/markoff-malatesta-cpas-pllc)
>
> ![Managing growth with technology](https://www.progress.com/images/default-source/products/podio/website_blogs_gettyimages-1183666141.jpg?sfvrsn=59f3c338_1)

> ### Podio keeps Integrity's teams connected and informed
>
> We needed an intuitive solution to
> the problem of collaborating across diverse operating contexts and
> time-zones, and to reduce the pain points of sharing spreadsheets back and
> forth. Podio transformed our entire information environment and instilled a
> culture of collaborative knowledge management.
>
> Will Lowrie
>
> Head of Data and Knowledge
> Management, Integrity
> [Read full\\
> story](https://www.sharefile.com/resource/customer-story/integrity-global)
>
> ![Podio keeps Integrity's teams connected and informed](https://www.progress.com/images/default-source/products/podio/website_customer_stories_gettyimages-1320523831.jpg?sfvrsn=d90675ce_1)

> ### Enterprise collaboration and business process automation
>
> Everything in Podio has enabled us
> to take the tool, make it ours and do exactly what we want with it as
> opposed to trying to fit our business into something else and does it in a
> way that is simple enough that most people can figure it out.
>
> Chris
> Blanchard
> Director of IT, Schuster Companies
>
> [Read full\\
> story](https://www.sharefile.com/resource/customer-story/schuster-concrete-companies)
>
> ![Enterprise collaboration and business process automation](https://www.progress.com/images/default-source/products/podio/website_customer_stories_gettyimages-1320808169.jpg?sfvrsn=9b9bec5f_1)

evidence.content:
> ### Giving a voice to the voiceless with Podio
>
> We shared those records with the
> hospital and identified that the person needed insulin. If that hadn’t
> gotten picked up from his Podio records, who knows what could’ve
> happened there.
>
> Jaquie Mills
>
> Managing Director, Microboards
> Australia
> [Read full\\
> story](https://www.sharefile.com/resource/customer-story/microboards-australia)
>
> ![Giving a voice to the voiceless with Podio](https://www.progress.com/images/default-source/products/podio/website_photography_gettyimages-1084167490.jpg?sfvrsn=d1b842fc_1)

evidence.page_title: Work Management Platform | Streamline Collaboration & Workflows | Podio
evidence.content:
- Real-time collaboration with comments, file sharing and mentions
- Shared workspaces among team members
- Client Access with free external licenses
- Mobile apps for iOS, Android and iPad
- Contextual search to find relevant content, conversations and records
- Multi-level permissions to support controlled sharing and focused teamwork
- Detailed user activity and revision history to support transparency and audit
preparation
